description_long: This object is a rectangular cardboard box of Paracetamol STADAPHARM, a common over-the-counter medicine. The box is predominantly turquoise blue with white and magenta accents, and features clear pharmaceutical branding and dosage information on the front. The front panel displays the medicine name, dosage (650 mg), and the number of tablets (20 comprimidos), along with usage instructions in Spanish. The top side includes a barcode and additional product details, while the sides are mostly solid color with some text and branding. The box appears to be sealed and is likely to contain blister packs of tablets inside. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and typical of pharmacy-sold boxed medicines.
description: A turquoise and magenta cardboard box of Paracetamol STADAPHARM 650 mg, containing 20 tablets, with clear pharmaceutical branding and dosage information.
description_view_0: The top of the box is visible, showing the barcode, product code, and some text in Spanish.
description_view_1: The left side of the box is shown, mostly solid white with a hint of the barcode and some product information.
description_view_2: The front of the box is visible, displaying the Paracetamol STADAPHARM branding, dosage, and usage instructions.
description_view_3: The right side of the box is shown, mostly turquoise with some magenta and white, and partial product information.
